suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require workers to mark skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false whenever they edit implementation before creating and running the new failing tests, including on fix reruns.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The fix-telemetry-duration-finalizer review found the worker updated packages/telemetry/src/span.ts before adding the new defect/interruption tests, while the handoff still reported skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align VAL-INFRA-012 with the implemented telemetry contract so it explicitly states whether durationMs is a required span attribute.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The fix-telemetry-duration-finalizer review found the validation contract still omits durationMs while .factory/library/architecture.md and the telemetry feature definitions treat durationMs as a required standard span attribute.
